summary: Iteration 63: Full pre-deployment testing of Summer Camp 2026 features including landing page animations, dynamic centers, booking flow, admin panel, mobile responsiveness, and font changes. Backend 16/16 tests passed. Most features working. One critical bug found: UUID center IDs sent from booking page are stored as center labels in DB. One missing backend endpoint: /api/summer-camp/batches returns 404.

critical.issue: Booking page now sends UUID center IDs (e.g. '726286f7-1ca7-412f-b7d5-d56e6dacaa00') from /api/centers API, but backend CENTERS dict only maps old slugs (mira_road, dombivli, andheri). center_label falls back to UUID string. Admin panel shows raw UUID in CENTER column.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint does not exist. Listed in test requirements as a feature to test. Batch data exists as hardcoded BATCH_DATES constant but not exposed via API.

ui_bugs.component: Admin Student CRM - Summer Camp Bookings tab CENTER column
ui_bugs.issue: New bookings from dynamic center flow show UUID (e.g. '726286f7-1ca7-412f-b7d5-d56e6dacaa00') as center label instead of readable center name. Caused by UUID center IDs from /api/centers being passed directly to backend which lacks UUID→name mapping.
ui_bugs.selector: Student CRM → Summer Camp tab → Bookings → CENTER column (row SC2026-957103)

ui_bugs.issue: selectedCenter?.name correctly shows the center name in the UI (frontend OK), but the submitted center ID is UUID which backend stores incorrectly. The user-facing UI shows the right name but admin records are broken.

integration_issues.issue: SummerCampBookingPage.jsx line 143-147 fetches centers from /api/centers and uses c.id (UUID) for form.center. Backend register/capture-lead store this UUID as center + center_label. Backend CENTERS dict does not include UUID mappings. Fix: either enrich backend to look up center name by UUID from centers collection, or store center_name alongside center_id in the booking.

features_verified.sticky_navbar: PASS - position: sticky, top: 0px, visible in viewport after 600px scroll

features_verified.scroll_reveal_animations: PASS - sr-blur/sr-scale/sr classes animate in on scroll (0→11 visible as user scrolls). IntersectionObserver working.
features_verified.booking_step1_age_group: PASS - 3 age groups: Little Explorers (4-8), Tech Creators (9-12), Future Innovators (13-16)
features_verified.booking_step2_mode: PASS - At a Center shows dynamic cities (Mumbai · Bangalore · Delhi · Hyderabad · Pune from API) · Online at Home
features_verified.booking_step3_centers: PASS - 8 centers from API shown with area+city format (Andheri West, Mumbai etc.) - online centers correctly excluded
features_verified.booking_step4_batch: PASS - 4 batch weeks shown with weekday/weekend toggle
features_verified.booking_step5_phone: PASS - phone input with validation (min 10 digits)
features_verified.admin_login: PASS - admin@oll.co / Dagaji03@ works, redirects to /admin dashboard
features_verified.admin_dashboard: PASS - loads with stats, overdue items, quick actions
features_verified.admin_school_crm: PASS - loads with meetings, followups sections. No errors.
features_verified.admin_orders_page: PASS - Orders & Payments page loads with School/Student payment tabs
features_verified.admin_student_crm_tracking_links: PASS - Student CRM → Summer Camp tab has Bookings + Tracking Links subtabs
features_verified.mobile_overflow: PASS - No horizontal overflow at 390px viewport (bodyWidth=390, windowWidth=390)
features_verified.nunito_sans_font: PASS - 'Nunito Sans', sans-serif applied as body font on main div and throughout
features_verified.mobile_typed_wrap: PASS - whiteSpace: normal on mobile (not nowrap), text wraps correctly
features_verified.no_console_errors: PASS - No JS console errors on summer camp landing page
features_verified.ticker_font_1_2rem: PASS - ticker items have font-size: 1.2rem in CSS
features_verified.batch_card_dates_font: PASS - batch card dates use JetBrains Mono at 1.2rem

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix center_label bug in booking flow. Routes/summer_camp.py capture-lead and register endpoints must look up center name from centers DB when given a UUID center ID. Approach: in both endpoints, query db.centers.find_one({'id': data.center}) to get center name, then use it for center_label. Fall back to old CENTERS dict if not found.
MEDIUM: Add GET /api/summer-camp/batches endpoint that returns BATCH_DATES data (currently defined in routes/summer_camp.py line 62-67 as a hardcoded dict but not exposed via API)
INFO: The hardcoded CENTERS constant in SummerCampBookingPage.jsx (lines 18-22) is now unused dead code - can be removed since centers are fetched from API
INFO: SummerCampLandingPage.jsx also has unused static CENTERS constant (lines 63-68) that can be removed since centers are now fetched from API
critical_code_review_comments: routes/summer_camp.py lines 55-60: CENTERS dict only maps old slugs (mira_road, dombivli, andheri, online). Now that booking page sends UUID center IDs from /api/centers, these mappings are irrelevant. Backend must be updated to support UUID-based center lookups: query db.centers by id to get the center name.
SummerCampBookingPage.jsx lines 18-22: Hardcoded CENTERS array is dead code - completely unused since line 143 fetches centers from API. Should be removed to avoid confusion.
SummerCampLandingPage.jsx lines 63-68: Same dead code - static CENTERS array unused since useEffect at line 248 fetches dynamically.
routes/summer_camp.py: No /batches endpoint but landing page batch data is hardcoded. If batches need to be configurable, expose them via API.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (all UI flows work; 1 critical data bug: UUID center_label in admin bookings)

seed_data_creation: 2 test bookings created during UUID center bug confirmation: SC2026-957103 (phone 9111222333, Tech Creators, OLL Andheri Center UUID). Previous iterations' test data also present.
mocked_apis: POST /api/summer-camp/initiate-payment — Cashfree not configured, returns 500. Only cash payment flow tested end-to-end. (unchanged from iter 62)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Summer Camp 2026 feature mostly working after recent changes (dynamic centers, Nunito Sans font, scroll animations, mobile overflow fix). Primary bug to retest: UUID center_label in admin Summer Camp bookings (row SC2026-957103 shows UUID in CENTER column). After fix, verify the CENTER column in Student CRM Summer Camp tab shows readable names like 'Andheri West, Mumbai' for new bookings. Also verify /api/summer-camp/batches endpoint if added. All 16 backend tests in test_summer_camp.py continue to pass. Admin login: admin@oll.co / Dagaji03@.

uuid_center_label_bug.bug: Booking page now fetches centers from /api/centers (dynamic) and uses c.id (UUID) as form.center value. Backend capture-lead and register endpoints use CENTERS.get(data.center, data.center) which returns the UUID itself as center_label when given a UUID (not found in old slug-based CENTERS dict).
uuid_center_label_bug.root_cause: The frontend was updated to use dynamic center IDs (UUIDs from /api/centers) but the backend summer_camp.py CENTERS dict was NOT updated to use UUIDs. The CENTERS dict still has old hardcoded slugs: {mira_road: '...', dombivli: '...', andheri: '...', online: '...'}. When a UUID is passed as center, CENTERS.get(UUID, UUID) returns the UUID itself.
uuid_center_label_bug.reproduction: 1. Go to /summer-camp/book, select any age group, select 'At a Center', select any center (e.g. OLL Andheri Center), select a batch, enter phone 9111222333, continue. 2. Go to admin/students → Summer Camp tab. The most recent booking will show a UUID in the CENTER column.
uuid_center_label_bug.fix: In routes/summer_camp.py, update both register_summer_camp and capture_lead functions. Before using CENTERS.get(data.center, data.center), first check if data.center is a UUID and look up the center from db.centers: center_doc = await db.centers.find_one({'id': data.center}, {'_id': 0}). If found, use f"{center_doc.get('area', '')}, {center_doc.get('city', '')}" as center_label. Otherwise fall back to CENTERS.get(data.center, data.center).
